warnings: IMPORTANT naming collision: this architecture sheet is titled 'บันได ST.2' but is a SEPARATE, SHORT SERVICE STAIR near the kitchen/laundry/maid's room (small step, ~0.5m rise) -- NOT the same as the structural 'ST2' interior main stair (floor1-to-landing-to-floor2, structural sheets S-11/S-12, ~3.15m total rise). Do not merge these two distinctly different stairs under one element_id in any downstream processing; they share a label by coincidence of the design office's naming convention but are physically different elements serving different purposes.
